programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: Mike and Marcus face their toughest case yet as their late captain's reputation hangs in the balance. Subsequently, they unravel a complex web of cartel connections in a high-stakes mission.

programme.title: Cloudy With a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: A diligent scientist invents an innovative machine that drops food from the sky to help his fellow residents. Chaos ensues when the machine becomes uncontrollable.
A spaceship crash lands on prehistoric Earth, leaving only two survivors. Soon, they must learn to fend for themselves amidst the hostile terrain and its vicious creatures.

programme.title: Sisu
programme.desc: As WWII comes to an end, Aatami Korpi trudges towards retirement with a bag full of gold. However, when a Nazi soldier learns about the treasure, he chases after the warrior, unaware of his prowess.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: After a night of revelry, four friends accidentally run over a man and dump his body to conceal their secret, unaware that the following year brings a series of eerie events in their lives.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J of the Men in Black goes back in time to prevent the assassination of his partner, Agent K, at the hands of an alien criminal named Boris the Animal.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

programme.title: Brightburn
programme.desc: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: When Peter Venkman, Raymond Stantz and Egon Spengler lose their jobs as scientists, they start an establishment called Ghostbusters to fight the evil ghosts lurking in New York City.

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York City in order to feed and protect its brood.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Belgium and Spain meet in the 2026 FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Los Angeles Stadium. Spain beat Portugal 1-0 behind a stoppage-time goal from midfielder Mikel Merino. Belgium dominated USA 4-1 in which forward Charles De Ketelaere netted a brace.

programme.title: NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series
programme.desc: The 2026 NASCAR Craftsman Truck Series LiUNA 150 gets underway at Lime Rock Park in Connecticut. Layne Riggs, Kayden Honeycutt and Chandler Smith arrive at the The Road Racing Center of the East for 100 laps, a 147.8-mile circuit.

programme.title: SPEED With Harvick & Buxton

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Norway and England meet in the FIFA World Cup Quarterfinals at Miami Stadium. Norway beat Brazil 2-1 behind Erling Haaland's late brace, while England defeated Mexico 3-2 behind Jude Bellingham's brace and Harry Kane's clutch penalty sealed the win.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets
programme.desc: The docs try to save a dog bitten by a rattlesnake.

programme.desc: The vets help a koi with a skin issue and invite a group of inner-city kids to the farm to learn how to check cows for pregnancy.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet
programme.desc: After checking a ranch's elk bulls who aren't showing signs of going into rut as expected, Michelle heads to the Southeast Alaska State Fair to have fun with her daughters.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet

programme.title: Dr. Oakley, Yukon Vet

programme.title: Sayang Abah (2011)
programme.desc: Kisah Along seorang insan yang pekak dan bisu memungut seorang bayi yang dibuang orang lalu membesarkannya seperti anak sendiri.

programme.title: Gelato

programme.title: Gelato

programme.title: Mael Lambong

programme.title: Suamiku Encik Perfect 10

programme.title: The Making of Polong
programme.desc: Maria Hadi bertaubat dari ilmu hitam sebelum mati. Tersilap mewariskan polong, makhluk itu membalas dendam dan menyumpah pewarisnya

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Mat So'od
programme.desc: Mat So'od merupakan penglipurlara di kampungnya. Namun berlawanan dengan kerjayanya, Mat So'od merupakan seorang pemurung hampir sepanjang hidupnya.

programme.title: Hanya Kawan
programme.desc: Kisah dua orang sahabat yang mula merasai kewujudan cinta di antara mereka namun merasa malu dan keliru untuk mengungkapkannya. Dibintangi oleh Ratu Rock Ella Aminuddin dan Hans Isaac.

programme.title: Cicakman 2 : Planet Hitam

programme.title: Cinta Kita

programme.title: 6 Hari
programme.desc: Suzi merupakan isteri ketiga dan dia tinggal bersendirian di banglonya kerana suaminya hanya pulang selang enam hari. Semuanya indah sehinggalah pada suatu hari dia didatangi seseorang dari masa silamnya.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep03
programme.desc: Adelia risks her career to win back her daughter's heart, while Adeef faces countless obstacles just to reach Hana.

Guided by 168 rules, the Zheng clan was honored by the emperor as the Number One Family of Jiangnan. Joey Zheng (Tay) explores the place, joins the Water Dragon Ritual, tastes the famed Zhengzhai mutton, and learns how to make Bench Dragon which the clan still uses to seek blessings from above.

No names on any document. No proof they ever existed. How do you grieve a life that never drew breath?

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An online pedophile ring -- including two high-profile suspects -- is targeted in an undercover sting.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Barba must drop rape charges against a popular actor due to lack of evidence, Rollins decides to take matters into her own hands.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A short-staffed NCIS team tackles an abduction case while Hetty is held in Washington, D.C., and another team member remains in the ICU.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Triad assassin poisons a Homeland Security agent; the discovery of a warehouse of counterfeit purses reveals a money trail to stolen government funds; Nell joins the team in the field.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: The murder of a Navy machinist sends the team on a citywide hunt for evidence; Anna Kolchek (Bar Paly) partners with Callen and Sam in the ongoing mole investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a suspect is gravely injured and the case becomes a public spectacle, Amaro's badge is on the line; Cragen surprises everyone with an announcement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an underage runaway is found beaten and raped, the SVU team works with federal prosecutor Connie Rubirosa (Alana De La Garza); ADA Barba suspects a cover-up when he fails to get the help he needs from Jersey law enforcement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro suspects the boyfriend of a missing girl is involved with a gang; Sgt. Benson becomes the SVU's new commanding officer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: High school football star Cedric Jones goes missing in New York and his uncle seeks help from their hometown friend, Detective Rollins; Cedric goes on a recruiting trip from Hudson University's football team; when the cops find him in jail, they suspect the truth may have led to a cruel prank; Sgt. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When Rollins strikes a deal with the managers of a gambling club in order to protect her job, she ends up drawing the suspicion of Benson and Tutuola.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A columnist who has been given access to the squad for a story declares a hate crime case a hoax, leaving the victim under media scrutiny and Benson fighting to get the case back on solid ground.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After a single mom is arrested for leaving her young daughter alone for days, Sgt. Benson suspects the woman may have been abused in her own childhood.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Taking an active approach to catching sex offenders, the team targets a photographer with a secret life whose fantasies may have crossed into reality.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro must face the consequence of his reckless behavior; when an online ad for escorts leads to the rape and robbery of tourists, Benson discovers she has a connection to one of the suspects.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson struggles to balance work and her new role of foster mother; when Amaro arrests a young prostitute with connections to Noah's mother, his undercover work sets off a dangerous chain of events.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's by-the-book handling of a starlet's arrest gets him back on the SVU squad in time to investigate the actress's latest offense, statutory rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Three young girls' search for a mythical character leads to one of them becoming injured and the other two disappearing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Sgt. Voight and Detectives Lindsay and Halstead work with Sgt. Benson and the SVU as they investigate the roots of a child pornography site; tension between Benson and Voight threatens the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When detective Tutuola finds security footage of a sportscaster being physically abusive to his girlfriend, Benson seeks help from Assistant DA Barba to convince the victim to fight back.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After being found unconscious in her hotel bathroom, an Atlanta detective -- in town for a law-enforcement conference -- says that she was raped; Rollins discovers a personal connection to the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The investigation into a murder of an illegal immigrant is hampered by the perception of police among the city's immigrant population.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: The investigation into a drug-related homicide is hampered by the neighborhood's no-snitch culture; Upton is asked about Ruzek's rough altercation with a suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A meth lab bust uncovers a scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online; Atwater struggles with decisions about moving his siblings to a safer environment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: A family is killed, and the team searches for a drug dealer with a likely connection; Voight asks Vice Sgt. Sean McGrady for help.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: Halstead goes undercover to stop an ex-military kidnapping crew from killing an innocent child.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.
programme.desc: When one of Voight's friends is found passed out in his hotel room with a dead Ukrainian girl, Intelligence discovers the murder is connected to a sting and Burgess' boyfriend.
Maddie's return to work proves to be more triggering than expected, as she may have returned too soon; Eddie struggles to adapt to his new surroundings.
After the 118 responds to several calls from the same person, Hen steps in to offer them advice; Eddie confronts his parents and takes a big step in his relationship with his son.
The 118 is called to a research lab that has been set on fire and becomes a biohazard.
Athena and Buck are in a race against time to rescue the rest of the 118 following the fire in the biolab.
Following the tragic events at the lab, the 118 must come together to lay their fallen hero to rest; despite her own grief, Athena re-investigates the death of a child to help a grieving mother.
Following an earthquake, the 118 races to the scene of several unusual fires and must figure out their cause before anyone else is hurt.
The 118, still reeling from their recent loss, is dispatched to a mass casualty event after a high-rise apartment building collapses; Athena and Chimney have to work together to save a familiar face.

programme.desc: Fresh off a win the Valkyries face the Fever in a regular-season matchup at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. The Valkyries beat the Sun, 79-64 for a franchise-record 7th straight victory. The Indiana Fever look to guard Kelsey Mitchell to anchor the offense.

Music and Lyrics
programme.desc: Eyeing a comeback, former pop star Alex is asked to write a song for a teenage superstar. When Alex recognises house sitter Sophie's talent for words, he must convince her to help him.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: Gracie Hart gives up being an FBI field agent to become the public face of the bureau. However, when two of her friends get kidnapped in Las Vegas, she sets out to rescue them, defying direct orders.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Superman and his super-dog Krypto share the same power and fight crime together. However, when Superman gets kidnapped, Krypto trains harder to rescue him.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: While trying to escape the evil wizard Gargamel, the blue-skinned Smurfs get sucked into a vortex that teleports them to New York. Thereafter, they try their best to find a way back home.

programme.title: She's Out of My League
programme.desc: An insecure airport security officer’s world shifts when a confident and beautiful woman shows interest in him, forcing him to confront self-doubt and social expectations.

programme.title: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After a break-up, Adam is looking for a casual relationship when he runs into Emma, and they agree to maintain a strictly physical association, but things get complicated when they both fall in love.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: New-York based lawyers Audrey and Daniel, who often compete against each other, get married. However, they find it difficult to learn to draw lines between their personal and professional lives.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A neurotic thirty-something woman resolves to finally take control of her life once and for all, while looking for h love.

programme.title: You, Me and Dupree
programme.desc: Dupree stays on as a houseguest with the newlyweds, much to the couple's annoyance.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: Alison, an ambitious television reporter, has a one-night stand with Ben, an immature loafer. When Alison gets pregnant as a result, the two attempt to stay together and have the child.

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 49
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 16
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 122
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 40
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 17
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 17
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 90

This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 90
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 50

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 17
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: Tom & Jerry
programme.desc: Jerry, a mischievous mouse, takes refuge in a fancy hotel that is set to host a wedding. In order to get rid of him, one of the event planners hires Jerry's feline rival, Tom.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: When talented getaway driver Baby meets his dream girl, Debora, he chooses to leave his shady life behind. But when he is called in for one last heist with an unstable crew, things get dicey.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: After Paris, a Trojan prince, has an affair with Menelaus's wife, Helen, he decides to take her with him. Later, Menelaus's brother uses that as an excuse to wage a war against the city of Troy.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Kong
programme.desc: King Kong is transported out of his containment zone after Godzilla resurfaces and creates mayhem. Humans need his help to reach Hollow Earth and find a way to subdue the king of the monsters.

programme.title: Shrek Forever After
programme.desc: Shrek is tired of his domesticated life and makes a deal with Rumpelstiltskin to live one day as a free ogre. But, this puts him in a dark alternate timeline where he never met his wife or friends.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an expert agent, confronts a worldwide plot. To prevent a nuclear crisis, he collaborates secretly with his team after his organisation is deceived.

programme.title: Shazam! Fury of the Gods
programme.desc: Bestowed with superpowers, Shazam and his foster siblings join forces against the daughters of Atlas who have stolen the Wizard's broken staff.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: An Egyptologist is caught in the crossfire when a sinister cult resurrects the mummified body of an evil priest. The group then aims to use his ancient power to defeat a legendary warrior.
